name: Meatballs in Chile Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb ground ham, smoked and cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut corn tortillas into 6-inch diameter pieces.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix until well incorporated.
3. Form the mixture into meatballs.
4.  For Red Sauce Recipe see Sowest2.zip, or use your favorite Mexican red sauce recipe.
5. Heat beef broth and simmer until hot.
6. Place meatballs in the hot beef broth and simmer until cooked through.
7. Turn off heat when desired doneness is reached.
